name: Salmon Steak En Papillote
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Finely chopped green onion (white part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 4 large heart-shaped pieces, each measuring approximately 15" x 14", from heavy-duty foil.
2. Brush one half of each heart with margarine.
3. Arrange a salmon steak on each buttered half of the foil.
4. Combine 1/4 teaspoon ginger and pepper in a small bowl.
5. Sprinkle the mixture over each salmon portion.
6. Fold the foil over the fish, folding the edges together to form a tight seal.
7. Place the packets on a baking sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 500°F (260°C) for 10 minutes, or until the packets puff. The fish should just begin to flake when touched with a fork.
9. In a separate pan, saute chopped green onion in margarine until fragrant.
10. Stir in cornstarch to form a roux, then add white wine and stir well.
11. Add evaporated milk and stir constantly over medium heat until the mixture thickens and boils.
12. Stir in 1/4 teaspoon grated ginger root, lime juice, and 1/8 teaspoon cayenne pepper.
13. To serve, spoon the sauce into a pool on plates and carefully place the salmon steak on top of the sauce. Garnish with dill sprigs.
